title: Miraculous World: New York, United HeroeZ
originalTitle: Miraculous World : New York, les héros unis
posterAlt: Miraculous World: New York, United HeroeZ (2020) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Marinette's class is headed to New York, the city of superheroes, for French-American Friendship Week. But the arrival of Hawk Moth will complicate everything.
synopsis: Miraculous World: New York, United HeroeZ is a 2020 animation, family and action film from France and South Korea. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
